view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided indicates that the system successfully created a gate marking a time window as unavailable based on the queue's ETA signal. Specifically, the scenario describes how the system created a gate from 2:00 PM to 2:30 PM and updated it when the ETA shifted, demonstrating the functionality required. This directly aligns with the requirement to support temporary unavailability windows based on queue ETA signals.
